vulnerability.reference: Developers prioritize loss minimization without independent rationale fidelity audits, embedding latent biases.
vulnerability.generated: Developers fine-tune with rationale-based loss without independent verification of grounding fidelity, enabling spurious correlations to entrench.

impact.reference: Widespread clinical misguidance from deployed models that consistently misinterpret visual evidence.
impact.generated: Deployed models produce misleading visual justifications, causing diagnostic errors and eroding clinical trust in AI-assisted imaging.

dose_response.reference: Joint segmentation and rationale generation models produce visually grounded textual justifications that may be inconsistent with actual evidence, and fine-tuning on these rationales amplifies spurious correlations, leading developers to deploy models that cause widespread clinical misguidance.
dose_response.generated: Visually grounded justifications inconsistent with image evidence from joint segmentation-rationale models, through developers fine-tuning with rationale-based loss functions, trigger fine-tuning without independent grounding verification, entrenching spurious correlations and leading to misleading visual justifications, diagnostic errors, and eroded clinical trust.
